markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Jose Fajardo records the first goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Panama vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Panama vs England professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
markets.title: Jose Fajardo: First Goalscorer

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 27, 2026 8 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 80.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below

NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 57.99° on Jun 27, 2026 at 8pm EDT?
